{{Quote|Droid bombers! Incoming!|A [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone trooper]]|<ref name="Heroes" />}}
The '''Trade Federation droid bomber''', or '''advanced droid bomber''', was a [[Droid starfighter/Legends|droid starfighter]] used by the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] and later the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]].

==Characteristics==
The advanced [[Droid/Legends|droid]] [[Bomber/Legends|bomber]] was armed with four [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]] and a high capacity bomb bay. Although well [[Armor/Legends|armored]] and [[Deflector shield/Legends|shielded]], it was slow and lacked maneuverability. In most cases, the bomber was deployed in [[Squadron/Legends|squadrons]] of five.

While the [[Vulture-class starfighter/Legends|''Vulture''-class droid starfighters]] enjoyed both maneuverability and speed, these bombers were easy to hit due to the predictability of their flight path. Like the ''Vulture'' and other Federation [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]], these craft were usually [[Droid control program|slaved]] to a [[Central Control Computer/Legends|central control computer]], often aboard a [[Lucrehulk-class battleship/Legends|''Lucrehulk''-class Droid Control Ship]].

The craft was a [[Xi Char/Legends|Xi Char]] design.

==History==
[[File:Adbomber.jpg|thumb|left|150px|A pair of advanced [[Droid/Legends|droid]] bombers.]]
The bomber was [[Battle of Lok (32 BBY)|used against]] the [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] [[Nym/Legends|Nym]] on [[Lok/Legends|Lok]].<ref name="SW:SF" /> During the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion]] of [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] in [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]],<ref name="The New Essential Chronology">''Star Wars: Starfighter'' itself refers to its events taking place during the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]]. ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' establishes that the invasion happens in [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]].</ref> the Trade Federation employed the droid bombers [[Battle of the Naboo resistance base|against]] that [[Planet/Legends|planet's]] [[Naboo Resistance|resistance forces]]<ref name="SW:SF" />.

The bombers saw further use in other places of Federation activity, such as the [[Karthakk system]]. They were also placed on-board [[C-9979 landing craft/Legends|C-9979]] [[Carrier/Legends|carriers]] guarding [[Nod Kartha]].<ref name="SW:JF" /> They were later used by the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], at the [[Battle of Viidaav]].<ref name="Heroes">{{CWACite|5|Heroes on Both Sides (comic story)}}</ref>
